HGSS.688.0001:
So I don’t forget just how great
it is to battle with you, how about\r
we exchange phone numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.688.0002:
Awesome! I definitely won’t forget
about you now!
HGSS.688.0004:
Oh! I see you’ve changed your mind
about exchanging phone numbers\r
with me![0200,0000]
HGSS.688.0005:
Hm? Wait, let me guess. You’re nearby,
aren’t you?\f
If you want to talk to me, why don’t
you do it in person?
HGSS.688.0006:
My [0100,000A,0000] works really hard!\f
End of report!
HGSS.688.0007:
You know... Yesterday, we beat a
[0100,000B,0000]!\f
End of report!
HGSS.688.0008:
Oh no... Just a little while ago, a
[0100,000B,0000] got away...\f
End of report!
HGSS.688.0009:
Do you remember?\f
The moment we first battled!\f
I want to battle with you again, to
relive that tense moment!\f
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.688.0010:
Do you remember?
We had plans to battle!\f
I’m waiting for you on
[0104,0003,0000], so hurry up!
HGSS.688.0011:
So, at last...
You’ve finally decided you want to learn\r
from the best fisherman.\f
That’s great.
I’ll teach you.\f
To start...
Look out at the surface of the water.\r
Breathe in deeply.\r
Hold your fishing rod and stand still.\r
Aim at a point quietly.\r
And, SHOO-OOOP! Cast out your line!\f
When you cast your line, keep a good
grip, or your Fishing Rod will go with it.\r
Make sure to hold on tight!\f
The hook and line will sink down into
the water, and you wait, just like that,\r
without moving.\f
Well, if your nose itches or something,
I suppose it’s OK to move a little bit.\f
And then, YOINK--you get a bite!
YANK on the line and pull it out of\r
the water!\f
Got it? YOINK and YANK!
If you YANK without a YOINK,\r
you’ll look like a fool, pulling up\r
nothing! Well, it might not be a YOINK,\r
might be it’s a BLOOP or a PLOOSH or a\r
BLOOSH, or even a SPLOOSH-SPLOOSH...\r
...Huh? I think we’re losing conn...\r
ction... Can...hear... Hello...? He...
